errors.popupBlocked: The sign-in popup was blocked. Please allow popups for this site and try again.
errors.unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not authorised in Firebase. Add it under Authentication → Settings → Authorised domains.
errors.operationNotAllowed: Google sign-in is not enabled. Enable it in the Firebase console under Authentication → Sign-in method.
errors.networkRequestFailed: Network error — check your internet connection and try again.
